0.text: Minimal bronchiectasis in the central parts of both lungs

1.text: Bronchiectasis more prominent in the left upper lobe lingular segment

2.text: Peribronchial thickening in the left upper lobe lingular segment

3.text: Minimal volume loss in the left upper lobe lingular segment

4.text: Findings consistent with scarring in both lung apices

5.text: Subcentimeter nodules in both lungs, many of which are calcified
